message: Read source files. PileId is a readonly struct - not directly serializable. Will use separate [SerializeField] PileType + int fields. Starting implementation.

PileView.cs written to Assets/Scripts/Views/Board/PileView.cs. Uses separate [SerializeField] PileType + int fields for serialization. All acceptance criteria addressed: card positioning per pile type, vertical tableau offsets, sorting orders, strip mode logic, pile base sprite, GetCardWorldPosition.
